message: Your deck. Made in the app.
creative_direction: Real printed Card-o-Bot deck on a wood or stone coffee table in a cool modern apartment with soft daylight, sofa edge, plant, or books visible. NOT a grey void studio. NOT a seamless infinite backdrop. Every card is a standard rectangular trading card with evenly rounded corners only. No HP-corner tab, notch, step, bite, or cutout. Keep the exact same custom FRONT card identity (Spyglebot art and stats) on every framing and ratio. Hero front face-up and centered; 2-3 official backs in a tight neat stack. On zoomed stills, optical center of the stack at mid-frame. Not casino night.

products.name: Card-o-Bot Deck Hero
products.asset_hint: CRITICAL: exact Spyglebot FRONT identity on every still (same art, name, HP, stats). Do not invent a different bot card. CRITICAL silhouette: standard rectangular playing card, evenly rounded corners only; no HP tab/notch/cutout; HP inside top-right of rectangle. CRITICAL environment: wood/stone coffee table in a real apartment with soft daylight and room context (sofa/plant/books). Never grey void studio. Stack: FRONT face-up centered; 2-3 official backs tight neat pile. Close-up fills frame. Zoom: stack optical center mid-frame with equal space above/below and apartment visible.
products.notes: Apartment table lifestyle. Standard rectangular cards only. Centered stack on zoom.
